Use.title: The team that already shipped this twice.
Use.lede: Founding team has run release infrastructure at two unicorns. The technical core is two people who wrote pipelines for 10,000-engineer orgs and then rewrote them.

Use.name: Jin Park
Use.bio: Built and ran the deploy infrastructure for Stripe's billing surface. 9 years at companies between 50 and 5,000 engineers.

Use.name: Rohan Mehra
Use.bio: Wrote the canary controller that ships every Cloudflare Workers release. Co-author of the SRE chapter on progressive delivery.

Use.name: Sara Lindqvist
Use.bio: Led the Service Catalogue and incident-management surfaces. Carried two of the team's three highest-NPS launches in 2024.

HStack.Text: led by a single partner, 18-month runway, two strategic SaaS angels reserved.

VStack.Text: 55% engineering hires (8 senior IC), 25% GTM, 20% infra + compliance (SOC 2 Type II).
